alkylation reagent: 55 mM iodoacetamide was added to quench reformation of disulfide bridges
alkylation concentration: 55 mM iodoacetamide was added to quench reformation of disulfide bridges
cleavage agent: sample was digested with trypsin overnight
enrichment method: enrichment by triple antibody pulldown, immobilized metal affinity chromatography
instrument: injected directly into a Thermo Q Exactive Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: ionized with a spray voltage of 2 kV
labeling: Peptides were labeled with TMT10plex Mass Tag Labeling Kits
reduction reagent: reduced with 1 M DTT in ammonium acetate
reduction concentration: reduced with 1 M DTT in ammonium acetate
